# Carousel

Cycles through slides of content with prev/next controls.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/carousel
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="carousel"
  example={0}
  code={`<div style={{ paddingInline: 40, width: 320 }}>
  <Carousel>
    <Carousel.Content>
      {Array.from({ length: 5 }, (_, i) => (
        <Carousel.Item key={i}>
          <div style={{ alignItems: "center", background: "var(--colors-bg-subtle)", border: "1px solid var(--colors-border-default)", borderRadius: 8, display: "flex", height: 160, justifyContent: "center" }}>{i + 1}</div>
        </Carousel.Item>
      ))}
    </Carousel.Content>
    <Carousel.Previous />
    <Carousel.Next />
  </Carousel>
</div>`}
/>

```tsx
<div style={{ paddingInline: 40, width: 320 }}>
  <Carousel>
    <Carousel.Content>
      {Array.from({ length: 5 }, (_, i) => (
        <Carousel.Item key={i}>
          <div
            style={{
              alignItems: 'center',
              background: 'var(--colors-bg-subtle)',
              border: '1px solid var(--colors-border-default)',
              borderRadius: 8,
              display: 'flex',
              height: 160,
              justifyContent: 'center',
            }}
          >
            {i + 1}
          </div>
        </Carousel.Item>
      ))}
    </Carousel.Content>
    <Carousel.Previous />
    <Carousel.Next />
  </Carousel>
</div>
```

## Props

| Prop          | Type                         | Required | Default | Description                                                     |
| ------------- | ---------------------------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `opts`        | `CarouselOptions`            | No       | -       | -                                                               |
| `orientation` | `CarouselOrientation`        | No       | -       | -                                                               |
| `plugins`     | `CarouselPlugin`             | No       | -       | -                                                               |
| `setApi`      | `(api: CarouselApi) => void` | No       | -       | Receives the Embla API once initialized, for external controls. |

## Variants

| Variant       | Values                   |
| ------------- | ------------------------ |
| `orientation` | `horizontal`, `vertical` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/carousel.json`
- Recipe: `carousel`
- Files: `src/components/ui/carousel.tsx`
